summary: Iteration 263: Bug fixes testing completed. All 3 critical bug fixes verified working: (1) Pipeline engine no longer deletes local images after R2 upload - cleanup moved to after pipeline completion, (2) Comic Storybook V2 generate endpoint works and returns QUEUED jobs, (3) ComicStorybookBuilder.js uses useRef(pollingRef) instead of useState for interval management - no infinite loops. Landing page testimonials section with 10 cards showing 4.4/5 rating verified.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays Continue button - needs z-index adjustment or auto-accept on interaction

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 VERIFIED: pipeline_engine.py line 390 - NO os.remove() after R2 upload. Cleanup only after pipeline completion (lines 1159-1170)
Bug Fix 2 VERIFIED: comic_storybook_v2.py /generate endpoint at line 373 creates job with QUEUED status

Bug Fix 3 VERIFIED: ComicStorybookBuilder.js - line 1: useRef imported, line 426: pollingRef = useRef(null), line 546: useCallback dependency array is [], lines 529-532: clearInterval uses pollingRef.current
RatingModal.js VERIFIED: line 72-78 - onClose() called before onSubmitSuccess() ensuring modal closes properly

BUG_1_STORY_VIDEO_PIPELINE.description: Local image files no longer deleted after R2 upload
changes: Line 389-390: Added comment 'NOTE: Keep local file — render stage needs it. Cleanup happens after pipeline completion.'
Lines 1159-1170: Cleanup code now runs AFTER pipeline completion (after upload stage)
BUG_1_STORY_VIDEO_PIPELINE.root_cause: Images were deleted after R2 upload, but render stage couldn't download from R2 due to connectivity issues
BUG_1_STORY_VIDEO_PIPELINE.fix: Keep local files until render completes, cleanup only after final video is uploaded

BUG_2_COMIC_STORYBOOK_GENERATE.behavior: Returns jobId with QUEUED status, processing happens in background

BUG_3_POLLING_INFINITE_LOOP.description: ComicStorybookBuilder no longer has stale closure bug with setInterval
changes: Line 546: useCallback for pollJobStatus has [] dependency (no stale closure)
Line 585: pollingRef.current = interval (stores interval in ref)
BUG_3_POLLING_INFINITE_LOOP.root_cause: useState for pollingInterval caused stale closure - clearInterval was called with outdated interval ID
BUG_3_POLLING_INFINITE_LOOP.fix: Use useRef instead of useState for interval ID storage

rating_modal_fix.description: RatingModal closes properly when user submits rating
rating_modal_fix.behavior: Lines 72-78: onClose() called first, then onSubmitSuccess() if provided

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes iteration 263: All 3 critical bugs verified fixed. (1) Pipeline engine cleanup moved to after completion - local files preserved during render. (2) Comic Storybook V2 generate returns QUEUED jobs. (3) pollingRef replaces pollingInterval useState to prevent stale closure in setInterval. Landing page has new testimonials section with 10 cards and 4.4/5 rating. Some intermittent 502 errors on comic-storybook-v2 endpoints but these are transient.
